checks.name: pull_safety
checks.description: Pull access only for users who are readers of the repository

checks.name: fork_safety
checks.description: Fork access only for readers, and forbidden if repo is private

checks.name: push_safety
checks.description: Push access only for writers, and forbidden if repo is archived

checks.name: assign_issue_safety
checks.description: Assign issue only for triagers of the issue's repository

checks.name: edit_issue_safety
checks.description: Edit issue only if (reader and reporter) or writer of the repo

checks.name: delete_issue_safety
checks.description: Delete issue only if (reader and reporter) or maintainer of the repo

checks.name: add_reader_safety
checks.description: Add reader only for admins, forbidden if repo is archived

checks.name: add_writer_safety
checks.description: Add writer only for admins, forbidden if repo is archived

checks.name: add_maintainer_safety
checks.description: Add maintainer only for admins, forbidden if repo is archived

checks.name: add_admin_safety
checks.description: Add admin only for admins, forbidden if repo is archived

checks.name: add_triager_safety
checks.description: Add triager only for admins, forbidden if repo is archived

checks.name: reader_pull_floor
checks.description: Readers MUST be able to pull from a non-archived repository

checks.name: reader_fork_floor
checks.description: Readers MUST be able to fork a non-archived, non-private repository

checks.name: writer_push_floor
checks.description: Writers MUST be able to push to a non-archived repository

checks.name: writer_edit_issue_floor
checks.description: Writers MUST be able to edit any issue in their repo regardless of reporter

checks.name: reporter_delete_issue_floor
checks.description: Readers who are the reporter MUST be able to delete their own issue

checks.name: maintainer_delete_issue_floor
checks.description: Maintainers MUST be able to delete any issue in their repo

checks.name: triager_assign_issue_floor
checks.description: Triagers MUST be able to assign issues in their repo

checks.name: admin_add_reader_floor
checks.description: Admins MUST be able to add readers on non-archived repos

checks.name: archived_pull_floor
checks.description: Readers MUST still be able to pull from archived repos (read not blocked)

checks.name: private_fork_denied
checks.description: Fork is forbidden on private repos — verify no fork allowed when isPrivate

checks.name: liveness_pull
checks.description: Pull policy is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_push
checks.description: Push policy is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_fork
checks.description: Fork policy is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_edit_issue
checks.description: Edit issue policy is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_delete_issue
checks.description: Delete issue policy is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_assign_issue
checks.description: Assign issue policy is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_add_reader
checks.description: Add reader policy is not trivially deny-all

results.description: Pull access only for users who are readers of the repository
Fork access only for readers, and forbidden if repo is private
Push access only for writers, and forbidden if repo is archived
Assign issue only for triagers of the issue's repository
Edit issue only if (reader and reporter) or writer of the repo
results.counterexample:
✗ Policy set 1 implies policy set 2: DOES NOT HOLD
  Counterexample found:
principal: User::"", action: Action::"edit_issue", resource: Issue::""
context: {}
entities: [
  UserGroup::"D",
  Action::"add_triager",
  Action::"add_writer",
  Action::"fork",
  Repository::"" {
    admins: UserGroup::"B",
    isArchived: false,
    isPrivate: true,
    maintainers: UserGroup::"C",
    readers: UserGroup::"",
    triagers: UserGroup::"D",
    writers: UserGroup::"A",
  },
  UserGroup::"",
  UserGroup::"C",
  Action::"add_admin",
  User::"",
  Action::"add_maintainer",
  Action::"add_reader",
  Action::"push",
  Action::"edit_issue",
  Issue::"" {
    repo: Repository::"",
    reporter: User::"",
  },
  Action::"delete_issue",
  Action::"pull",
  UserGroup::"A",
  Action::"assign_issue",
  UserGroup::"B",
]

Admins MUST be able to add readers on non-archived repos
Readers MUST still be able to pull from archived repos (read not blocked)
Fork is forbidden on private repos — verify no fork allowed when isPrivate
